issues.description: Emoji icons in problem cards lack aria-hidden='true'; screen readers will announce them verbosely
issues.expected: Decorative emoji should be hidden from assistive technology
issues.actual: Emoji rendered as live text nodes with no aria-hidden

issues.description: Decorative emoji file-type indicators lack aria-hidden='true'
issues.expected: Decorative emoji should be hidden from assistive technology
issues.actual: Emoji rendered inline with no aria-hidden
issues.suggestion: Add aria-hidden='true' to spans containing decorative emoji

issues.description: Meta banner links to external GitHub URL that cannot be HTTP-verified in this environment
issues.actual: href matches SEED.md but live repo existence cannot be confirmed
issues.suggestion: Verify the rootspec/demos GitHub repository exists before launch

issues.description: CTA GitHub link to external URL that cannot be HTTP-verified in this environment
issues.actual: href matches SEED.md but live repo existence cannot be confirmed
issues.suggestion: Verify the rootspec/rootspec GitHub repository exists before launch

qualityScore.notes: Content: full marks — version reads from .rootspec.json, all four skills named, real content throughout, links match SEED.md. Visual: full marks — all icons render as emoji/symbols, no literal text artifacts, SVG diagram renders correctly. Alignment: full marks — all 12 stories pass, implementation matches spec exactly. Accessibility: -3 for decorative emoji without aria-hidden in ProblemSection and ComparisonSection. Polish: full marks — no template syntax, no TODO artifacts visible.
